hero.title: Full Control Over Your Computer
hero.subtitle: Real-time CPU, RAM and GPU monitoring, deep system cleanup, gaming center and utilities — all in one premium app for Windows.

monitoring.title: Real-Time Monitoring
monitoring.subtitle: CPU, RAM, GPU, disks and temperatures — all metrics update every 2 seconds

modal.title: Monitoring — Full Details
modal.cpuDesc: Model, core count, frequency, temperature, real-time load with historical graph
modal.ramDesc: Timings, occupied slots, voltage, frequency and capacity per channel
modal.gpuDesc: Model, VRAM, core/memory frequency, temperature, fan speed
modal.diskDesc: S.M.A.R.T. diagnostics, temperature, health, read/write speed
modal.netDesc: Adapter, IP address, download/upload speed, ping, traffic
modal.batteryDesc: Wear level, charge cycles, current capacity, remaining time

cleanup.title: Deep System Cleanup
cleanup.subtitle: Remove gigabytes of junk — temp files, browser cache, logs and recycle bin

modal.title: Cleanup — Full Details
modal.tempFilesDesc: Temp, Prefetch, Recent, update folders — safe removal without risk to the system
modal.browserCacheDesc: Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Opera, Brave — cache, cookies, browsing history cleanup
modal.recycleDesc: Complete cleanup of recycle bin on all drives and Windows clipboard
modal.registryDesc: Remove broken keys with automatic restore point creation
modal.startupDesc: Manage startup programs and Windows services for faster boot

gaming.title: Gaming Center
gaming.subtitle: Scan Steam, Epic and GOG — launch games with system optimization in one click
gaming.gameModeDesc: Disables notifications, closes background processes, boosts game priority

modal.title: Gaming Center — Full Details
modal.scanDesc: Automatic detection of installed games from Steam, Epic Games Store, GOG Galaxy and other launchers
modal.optimizeDesc: Memory cleanup, closing unnecessary processes, power plan tuning for maximum performance
modal.overlayDesc: Display FPS, CPU/GPU temperature, RAM usage in-game — customizable overlay
modal.captureDesc: Gameplay video recording and instant screenshots via hotkey with auto-save

control.title: Everything Your PC Needs
control.subtitle: Six powerful modules in one application
